ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "filtered_price" TEXT /* Filtered price of the stock (e.g., moving average) */,
  "trend_line" TEXT /* Trend line of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adj_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was first listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Filtered price of the stock (e.g., moving average)
